gsa-control.ps1.info: DediConnect Windows startup control script. Minimal launcher only; GSA + Steam handles installation and updates.
gsa-control.ps1.content:
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$ServerRoot = "C:\Users\ContainerUser\serverfiles"
$ServerExe = Join-Path $ServerRoot "srcds.exe"
$GamePort = '{gameserver.game_port}'
$StartMap = '{config_parameter id="start_map"}'
$SlotLimit = '{gameserver.slot_limit}'
$Gslt = '{config_parameter id="steam_gslt"}'

if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $ServerExe)) {
    Write-Error "TF2 server executable was not found at $ServerExe. Confirm the GSA Steam install for app 232250 completed before launch."
    exit 1
}

$ServerArgs = @(
    "-game", "tf",
    "-console",
    "-norestart",
    "-usercon",
    "-strictportbind",
    "-condebug",
    "-port", $GamePort
)

if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($Gslt) -and $Gslt -notmatch '^\s*\{') {
    $ServerArgs += @("+sv_setsteamaccount", $Gslt)
}

$ServerArgs += @(
    "+map", $StartMap,
    "+maxplayers", $SlotLimit,
    "+exec", "server.cfg"
)

Set-Location -LiteralPath $ServerRoot
Write-Host "Starting Team Fortress 2 Dedicated Server"
Write-Host ("Executable: " + $ServerExe)
Write-Host ("Args: " + ($ServerArgs -join " "))

& $ServerExe @ServerArgs
exit $LASTEXITCODE

server.cfg.info: Primary TF2 server configuration. The minimal launcher passes startup-only values; keep this file editable for advanced manual cvars.
server.cfg.content:
// ============================================================================
// Team Fortress 2 - GameServerApp managed server.cfg
// ============================================================================

// Server identity and access
hostname "{gameserver.list_name}"
rcon_password "{gameserver.rcon_password}"
sv_password "{config_parameter id="server_password"}"
sv_tags "{config_parameter id="server_tags"}"
sv_lan "{config_parameter id="sv_lan"}"

// Client content and downloads
sv_pure "{config_parameter id="sv_pure"}"
sv_allowdownload "{config_parameter id="allow_downloads"}"
sv_allowupload "{config_parameter id="allow_uploads"}"
sv_downloadurl "{config_parameter id="fastdl_url"}"

// Template-managed files
mapcyclefile "cfg/mapcycle.txt"
motdfile "cfg/motd.txt"
motdfile_text "cfg/motd_text.txt"

// Match flow
mp_timelimit "{config_parameter id="mp_timelimit"}"
mp_maxrounds "{config_parameter id="mp_maxrounds"}"
mp_winlimit "{config_parameter id="mp_winlimit"}"
mp_windifference "{config_parameter id="mp_windifference"}"
mp_match_end_at_timelimit "{config_parameter id="mp_match_end_at_timelimit"}"
mp_disable_respawn_times "{config_parameter id="mp_disable_respawn_times"}"

// Team balance
mp_autoteambalance "{config_parameter id="mp_autoteambalance"}"
mp_teams_unbalance_limit "{config_parameter id="mp_teams_unbalance_limit"}"
mp_scrambleteams_auto "{config_parameter id="mp_scrambleteams_auto"}"
mp_scrambleteams_auto_windifference "{config_parameter id="mp_scrambleteams_auto_windifference"}"

// Voice and gameplay
sv_alltalk "{config_parameter id="sv_alltalk"}"
tf_weapon_criticals "{config_parameter id="tf_weapon_criticals"}"
tf_weapon_criticals_melee "{config_parameter id="tf_weapon_criticals_melee"}"

// TF bots
tf_bot_quota "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_quota"}"
tf_bot_quota_mode "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_quota_mode"}"
tf_bot_difficulty "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_difficulty"}"
tf_bot_join_after_player "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_join_after_player"}"
tf_bot_auto_vacate "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_auto_vacate"}"

// Votes
sv_vote_issue_kick_allowed "{config_parameter id="vote_kick"}"
sv_vote_issue_changelevel_allowed "{config_parameter id="vote_changelevel"}"
sv_vote_issue_nextlevel_allowed "{config_parameter id="vote_nextlevel"}"
sv_vote_issue_scramble_teams_allowed "{config_parameter id="vote_scramble"}"

// Performance and logging
sv_hibernate_when_empty "{config_parameter id="sv_hibernate_when_empty"}"
log on
sv_logfile 1
sv_logecho 0
sv_log_onefile 0
sv_logbans 1

writeid
writeip

mapcycle.txt.info: One map name per line. This is the default stock-map rotation; edit it for your desired modes and custom maps.
mapcycle.txt.content:
pl_upward
pl_badwater
pl_barnblitz
cp_dustbowl
cp_gorge
cp_granary
koth_viaduct
koth_sawmill
ctf_2fort
ctf_turbine

motd.txt.info: HTML Message of the Day. The included template displays the MOTD Message parameter; edit this file for custom HTML.
motd.txt.content:
{gameserver.list_name}

{config_parameter id="motd_message"}

start_map.name: Starting Map
start_map.info: Map loaded when the server starts. Enter a valid TF2 map name without .bsp, for example pl_upward, cp_process_final, koth_viaduct, or ctf_2fort.

steam_gslt.name: Steam Game Server Login Token
steam_gslt.info: Recommended for a public TF2 server. Create a Team Fortress 2 token for App ID 440 and keep a unique token per concurrently running server.

sv_lan.name: LAN Mode
sv_lan.info: On is for a local-network server. Off is for a normally internet-accessible server.

server_password.name: Join Password
server_password.info: Leave blank for public access. When populated, players must enter this password to join.

server_tags.name: Server Browser Tags
server_tags.info: Comma-separated tags for server-browser filtering, for example community,vanilla,casual.

motd_message.name: MOTD Message
motd_message.info: Short message shown by the included HTML and plain-text MOTD files. Edit motd.txt directly for a full custom page.

sv_pure.name: Content Purity
sv_pure.info: Controls client custom-content enforcement. Standard mode is appropriate for a typical public server; disabled is more permissive and strict is more restrictive.

allow_downloads.name: Allow Client Downloads
allow_downloads.info: Allows clients to download required custom maps or content through the game server or FastDL.

allow_uploads.name: Allow Client Uploads
allow_uploads.info: Allows player uploads to the server. Keep disabled unless you specifically require it.

fastdl_url.name: FastDL URL
fastdl_url.info: Optional web URL for faster custom-content downloads. Leave blank when not using FastDL.

mp_timelimit.name: Map Time Limit (minutes)
mp_timelimit.info: Minutes before the map time limit is reached. Set 0 to disable this limit.

mp_maxrounds.name: Maximum Rounds Per Map
mp_maxrounds.info: Completed-round limit before changing map. Set 0 to disable this limit.

mp_winlimit.name: Wins Needed To Change Map
mp_winlimit.info: Changes map when a team reaches this many round wins. Set 0 to disable.

mp_windifference.name: Win Difference Limit
mp_windifference.info: Changes map when one team leads by this many wins. Set 0 to disable.

mp_match_end_at_timelimit.name: End Immediately At Time Limit
mp_match_end_at_timelimit.info: On ends the current map as soon as the time limit is reached. Off uses the mode's normal end-of-round behavior.

mp_disable_respawn_times.name: Instant Respawns
mp_disable_respawn_times.info: On disables normal respawn-wave delays. Off preserves normal TF2 respawn timing.

mp_autoteambalance.name: Automatic Team Balance
mp_autoteambalance.info: Allows the server to balance teams when player counts become uneven.

mp_teams_unbalance_limit.name: Team Imbalance Limit
mp_teams_unbalance_limit.info: Allowed player-count difference before automatic balancing can intervene.

mp_scrambleteams_auto.name: Automatic Team Scramble
mp_scrambleteams_auto.info: Enables automatic scrambling based on the configured win-difference threshold.

mp_scrambleteams_auto_windifference.name: Auto-Scramble Win Difference
mp_scrambleteams_auto_windifference.info: Win difference used by automatic team scrambling when it is enabled.

sv_alltalk.name: All Talk
sv_alltalk.info: Allows voice chat across teams when enabled.

tf_weapon_criticals.name: Random Critical Hits
tf_weapon_criticals.info: Enables or disables TF2's normal random critical-hit system.

tf_weapon_criticals_melee.name: Random Melee Critical Hits
tf_weapon_criticals_melee.info: Disabled prevents random melee crits. Follow Global only permits them when Random Critical Hits is on. Always permits random melee crits even when global random crits are off.
tf_weapon_criticals_melee.dropdown: {"Follow Global Random Crit Setting":"1","Disabled":"0","Always Allow Melee Random Crits":"2"}

tf_bot_quota.name: TF Bot Quota
tf_bot_quota.info: Total number of TF bots managed by the selected quota mode. Set 0 to run without bots.

tf_bot_quota_mode.name: TF Bot Quota Mode
tf_bot_quota_mode.info: Normal maintains a bot count. Fill keeps total players at the quota. Match maintains a human-to-bot ratio using the quota.

tf_bot_difficulty.name: TF Bot Difficulty
tf_bot_difficulty.info: Difficulty assigned to joining TF bots.

tf_bot_join_after_player.name: Bots Wait for a Human Player
tf_bot_join_after_player.info: When enabled, bots do not join until at least one human player connects.

tf_bot_auto_vacate.name: Bots Yield Slots to Humans
tf_bot_auto_vacate.info: When enabled, managed bots automatically leave to make room for human players.

vote_changelevel.name: Allow Change-Map Votes
vote_changelevel.info: Allows player votes to change the current map.

vote_nextlevel.name: Allow Next-Map Votes
vote_nextlevel.info: Allows player votes for the next map.

vote_scramble.name: Allow Team-Scramble Votes
vote_scramble.info: Allows player votes to scramble teams.

sv_hibernate_when_empty.name: Hibernate While Empty
sv_hibernate_when_empty.info: Allows the server to reduce activity while no players are connected.
